supervisor.reason: The workflow guidance is validated, and commit instructions now cover ignored `.dev` files plus stored-message verification.

bootstrap.goal: Redefine `.dev/DASHBOARD.md` to show actual in-progress work and `.dev/TASKS.md` to list prompt-derived development items.

tasks.resume_checkpoint: All prompt-derived phase items for this scope are complete. Resume from commit preparation or the next user-directed planning slice.

items.text: Phase 1. Redefine `DASHBOARD.md` so it shows the actual in-progress work for the active scope
Phase 2. Redefine `TASKS.md` as a prompt-derived development checklist
Phase 3. Standardize task items as `[ ] Phase N. <title>` entries
Phase 4. Update templates, state sync, and tests so the new format is generated and validated consistently

next_action: Prepare a commit for the dashboard and prompt-derived task-role changes, or begin the next user-directed planning slice.
notes: Treat this file as machine truth and keep Markdown synchronized.
DASHBOARD.md should show the actual progress of the active scope.
TASKS.md should list prompt-derived development items in `[ ] Phase N. <title>` format.
Template output, parser behavior, and operator docs should all agree on the new roles.
Validation passed with `python3 -m unittest tests.test_tasks tests.test_state_repository tests.test_loop_runner tests.test_supervisor`.

latest_commit.summary: Refine workflow and commit guidance for test authoring
